title: gossypium hirsutum var. schottii
intro: Gossypium hirsutum var. schottii, a variety of cotton plant, is a type of wild cotton that is native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. It has been used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing, due to the presence of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The plant has various health benefits, including anti-oxidant, anti-inflammatory, and anti-microbial properties, which can help to protect against infections and promote overall well-being. Herbal preparations of Gossypium hirsutum var. schottii can be made into teas, tinctures, and salves to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
